description: Kids Day Leitstand UI View: Create the frontend view for managing and monitoring Kids Day from the Management Desktop shell. This includes a dedicated 'Kids Day' navigation entry in the Leitstand section of the desktop sidebar, and a full-featured view with: configuration panel, activation/deactivation controls, live KPI dashboard during Kids Day, maze intensity overview with per-maze controls, and real-time status updates via SSE.
steps: Create web/js/views/kidsday.js following the pattern of dashboard.js and settings.js. Export async function kidsdayView({onCleanup, refresh}).

The view should have these sections: (1) A status banner showing whether Kids Day mode is currently active or inactive with activate/deactivate button, (2) A KPI row (using the shared kpi() helper) showing: Gruppen heute, Aktive Gruppen, Ø Wartezeit, Offene Meldungen kids-related, (3) A maze intensity panel showing each maze with its configured intensity level (leicht/mittel/aus) as clickable chips that PATCH the intensity, (4) A configuration panel (collapsible) for date, time window, default intensity, safety briefing toggle, (5) A Kids Day checklist status section showing completion of kidsday-specific checklists.

Register the view in web/js/shell/desktop.js: add an import for kidsdayView, add a NAV entry { id: 'kidsday', label: 'Kids Day', icon: 'users', view: kidsdayView } in the 'Leitstand' section (after 'chat' entry, before the 'Planung' section).
The view should subscribe to SSE topics ['kidsday', 'settings', 'live', 'checklists'] for real-time updates using onCleanup(on([...], refresh)).

Use the existing UI patterns: panel() for sections, badge() for status indicators, sheet() for confirmation dialogs (e.g. confirming activation), h() for all DOM construction, act() for API calls with toast feedback.
The activate/deactivate action should show a confirmation sheet (like phaseSheet in shared.js) before executing, since it affects the entire event.
Add maze intensity display using colored badges: 'leicht' = green/ok tone, 'mittel' = yellow/warn tone, 'aus' = red/err tone (maze is closed for Kids Day).
acceptance_criteria: The 'Kids Day' entry appears in the Desktop shell sidebar under the Leitstand section
Navigating to #/kidsday loads the Kids Day view without errors
The view displays current Kids Day status (active/inactive)
KPI cards render with data from GET /api/kidsday/overview
Maze intensity chips are clickable and update via PATCH /api/kidsday/mazes/:id
Activate/Deactivate button works with confirmation dialog
View auto-refreshes on SSE events (kidsday, settings topics)
verification: Run `npm test` from /projects/sandbox/HORRORGETICON-OPS and confirm all existing tests pass
Start server with `node server/main.js --demo` and navigate to http://localhost:8787 - login as DR-0001/4711, verify Kids Day appears in sidebar and view loads
